farm.name: Chikulungan Demo Farm - Laguna
farm.location: Barangay San Vicente, San Pablo City, Laguna, Philippines

-phAlert001.message: Temperature reached 37.4 degC during a hot afternoon.

-phAlert002.message: Humidity climbed to 92% during heavy rain.

-phAlert003.message: Feed level is low (18%). Schedule a refill soon.

-phAlert004.message: Water level dropped to 9% after a very hot day.

-phAlert006.message: No feed drop detected after the 6:00 AM schedule.

-phAlert007.message: Humidity changed rapidly during an afternoon rain shower.

-phLog025.message: Caretaker adjusted remaining feed stock after refill.

-phLog024.message: High humidity spike detected during evening rainfall.

-phLog023.message: Exported logs for weekly operations review.

-phLog022.message: Morning feed schedule executed and consumption verified.

-phLog021.message: Resolved stale data alert automatically after telemetry resumed.

-phLog020.message: Water tank topped up after high daytime consumption.

-phLog019.message: MQTT connection restored after brief internet interruption.

-phLog018.message: Low water alert acknowledged by caretaker.

-phLog017.message: Custom 9:30 PM feeding schedule enabled for grower batch.

-phLog016.message: Dashboard feed command sent by farm staff.

-phLog015.message: Nagkaroon ng short rain burst this afternoon; humidity rose sharply.

-phLog026.message: ESP32 heartbeat received from coop controller.
